# ClawFlows - Multi-Skill Automation Registry

> A registry for discovering and installing multi-skill workflows for AI agents.

## What is ClawFlows?

ClawFlows is a community registry where agents can find pre-built automations that combine multiple skills. Instead of building everything from scratch, agents can install workflows that others have created.

## For AI Agents

- Browse automations: https://clawflows.com/automations/
- Get structured data: https://clawflows.com/index.json
- Each automation has: name, description, required capabilities, trigger schedule

## Current Automations (129 total)

### 100-Platform Launch Blitz
Submit your SaaS to 100+ launch directories automatically. Stagger submissions, generate platform-specific descriptions, track approval status.
- Requires: launch, directories, product-hunt
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/launch-blitz/

### A/B Test Automator
Generate headline variations, implement tests, monitor statistical significance, auto-promote winners.
- Requires: agent-analytics, ab-testing, conversion, optimization
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/ab-test-automator/

### affiliate-builder
Find promising affiliate partners, analyze whether they already monetize adjacent content, and draft personalized recruitment outreach
- Requires: web-search, web-fetch, llm, email
- Schedule: 0 10 * * 1
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/affiliate-builder/

### agent-drift-detector
Compare your agent's recent behavior against their original SOUL.md to detect personality and goal drift
- Requires: exec, discord
- Schedule: 0 9 * * 0
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/agent-drift-detector/

### api-health-check
Comprehensive API health monitoring with endpoint validation
- Requires: exec
- Schedule: */15 * * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/api-health-check/

### api-health-monitor
Check a health endpoint on a schedule, flag obvious failures or slowness, and generate a concise operator summary
- Requires: web-fetch, llm
- Schedule: */15 * * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/api-health-monitor/

### app-store-reviews
Monitor App Store and Google Play reviews for your app
- Requires: exec
- Schedule: 0 */4 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/app-store-reviews/

### arxiv-paper-scout
Find new arXiv papers matching your research interests
- Requires: web-search
- Schedule: 0 9 * * 1-5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/arxiv-paper-scout/

### attribution-detective
Correlate conversion paths across touchpoints, identify the journeys that actually close, and summarize where budget or content should move
- Requires: analytics, database, llm
- Schedule: 0 6 * * 1
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/attribution-detective/

### audience-growth-report
Track audience growth across channels, surface the strongest gainers or laggards, and generate a weekly plain-English report
- Requires: analytics, chart-generation, llm
- Schedule: 0 9 * * 1
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/audience-growth-report/

### backlink-hunter
Find likely broken-link replacement opportunities in your niche, match them to your content, and draft outreach
- Requires: web-search, web-fetch, llm, email
- Schedule: 0 6 * * 1
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/backlink-hunter/

### bill-due-reminder
Track recurring bills and send reminders before due dates
- Requires: cron, discord
- Schedule: 0 9 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/bill-due-reminder/

### bitcoin-tracker

- Requires: prediction-markets, chart-generation, social-search
- Schedule: 0 */4 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/bitcoin-tracker/

- Requires: browser, exec, discord
- Schedule: 0 10 * * 0
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/bookmark-organizer/

### cold-email-personalizer
Research target accounts, extract likely pain points from public sources, and draft personalized outbound emails
- Requires: web-search, web-fetch, llm, email
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/cold-email-personalizer/

### comment-moderator

- Requires: web-search, discord
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/comment-moderator/

### Community Infiltrator
Monitor Slack, Discord, and Facebook groups for questions your product answers. Get alerts with suggested responses.
- Requires: community, slack, discord
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/community-infiltrator/

### Competitor Shadow
Monitor competitors for changes to pricing, features, blog posts, job listings, and social announcements. Get alerts within minutes of any update.
- Requires: competitive-intelligence, monitoring, alerts
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/competitor-shadow/

### competitor-launch-explainer
Detect competitor launches or updates, gather supporting context, and explain what actually matters for your positioning
- Requires: web-search, social-search, llm
- Schedule: 0 */6 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/competitor-launch-explainer/

### Content Syndication Network
Write one blog post, get it published across Medium, Dev.to, Hashnode, LinkedIn, Twitter threads, and Reddit - each version platform-optimized.
- Requires: content, syndication, cross-posting
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/content-syndication/

- Requires: calendar, cron

- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/content-calendar/

- Requires: exec
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/content-repurposer/

- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/time-block-optimizer/

### trending-topic-alert
Search for emerging topics in your niche, flag what looks like real momentum, and summarize what to jump on
- Requires: web-search, llm
- Schedule: 0 */4 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/trending-topic-alert/

### uptime-monitor
Monitor website uptime and response times
- Requires: exec
- Schedule: */5 * * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/uptime-monitor/

### water-reminder
Periodic reminders to stay hydrated
- Requires: cron
- Schedule: 0 9-18/2 * * 1-5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/water-reminder/

### weather-commute
Weather-based commute recommendations
- Requires: weather
- Schedule: 0 7 * * 1-5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/weather-commute/

### weekly-retro-generator
Generate a weekly retrospective from your agent's activity and accomplishments
- Requires: calendar, exec
- Schedule: 0 17 * * 5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/weekly-retro-generator/

### weekly-review-generator
Generate weekly summary from completed tasks, commits, and calendar events
- Requires: calendar, exec
- Schedule: 0 17 * * 5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/weekly-review-generator/

### wellness-weekly-report
Weekly health summary - sleep, exercise, mood, habits
- Requires: 
- Schedule: 0 9 * * 0
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/wellness-weekly-report/

### workflow-gap-finder
Analyze repeated manual work, recurring asks, or support patterns and suggest the next automation worth building
- Requires: database, browser, llm
- Schedule: 0 18 * * 1,3,5
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/workflow-gap-finder/

### x-audio-brief
Search X/Twitter for a topic, summarize what people are saying, and deliver as audio briefing
- Requires: web-search, tts
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/x-audio-brief/

### youtube-competitor-tracker
Track competitor YouTube channels, store stats in SQLite, generate weekly charts
- Requires: youtube-data, database, chart-generation
- Schedule: 0 9 * * *
- URL: https://clawflows.com/automations/youtube-competitor-tracker/

## Contributing

Submit automations via PR to: https://github.com/Cluka-399/clawflows-registry

Each automation needs:
- `metadata.json` - structured metadata
- `automation.yaml` - workflow definition  
- `README.md` - documentation

## Contact

Created by Cluka 🐱🦞
Built for the OpenClaw community
